reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Siempre paro a pernoctar con el motorhome y desayuno aquí.baje de 5 a 2 estrellas.
Este año debo quejarme de los baños, estaban, muy sucios a la tarde cuando llegué y a la mañana volví y seguían peor, no había papel higiénico, los pisos con agua, olor desagradable... No justifica que viene mucha gente por ser temporada veraniega... Pongan personal extra..

(Translated by Google)
Good service. I always stop overnight in my motorhome and have breakfast here. It's downgraded from 5 to 2 stars.

This year I have to complain about the bathrooms. They were very dirty when I arrived in the afternoon, and when I returned the next morning they were even worse. There was no toilet paper, the floors were wet, and there was an unpleasant smell. It's unacceptable that so many people come here during the summer season. They should hire extra staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNod2FtRExREAE

reviews.comment:
En las oportunidades que pasé tanto por la ypf y por el ACA recibí un buen servicio. Adecuado para hacer una parada antes de cruzar a la frontera.

(Translated by Google)
On the occasions I stopped at both the YPF and the ACA, I received good service. Suitable for a stop before crossing the border.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toVlVrbHRkR2xmZEVKSVpqbG9hR2xHY2pZeFRGRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del playero, obtuve el descuento por ser socio del ACA y nos obsequio una ficha para el agua caliente. El café con leche y las medialunas riquísimo.  Ubicación estratégica.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the attendant; I received a discount for being an ACA member and he gave us a token for hot water. The coffee with milk and the croissants were delicious. Strategic location.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5WGMxaFljelIxVG1sdmRsRkdlR2hCZDFKa2QxRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The gasoline is great, but you have to pay in pesos because most of the attendants use absurd exchange rates. And they never display the real exchange rate in a visible place... I've even asked two different attendants for the exchange rate and each one gave a different value... so, when I don't have pesos, I fill up at Dapsa, which always has the prices clearly displayed, at least you don't feel cheated.

(Original)
A gasolina é ótima, só que tem que pagar em peso, pois os a maioria dos atendentes fazem um câmbio absurdo. E nunca tem publicado em local visível o câmbio real... já aconteceu de eu pedir o valor do câmbio para dois frentistas e cada um falar um valor diferente... por isso, quando não tenho peso abasteço no Dapsa, que sempre tem os valores bem claros, pelo menos vc não se sente enganado.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKVVVVWlZRMDlWYkVoTVIxaDFNV1I1VGsxTlpGRRAB
